headline: FCC chair slams broadcasters after Trump disputes reports on Iran-damaged U.S. tankers

headline: YouTube overtakes Hollywood studios, but it will show you 30-second unskippable TV ads
summary: YouTube's ad revenue hit $40.4 billion in 2025, surpassing Disney, NBCU, Paramount, and WBD combined. The shift changes what "TV" means for viewers who can't escape those unskippable spots. The post YouTube overtakes Hollywood studios, but it will show you 30-second unskippable TV ads appeared first on Digital Trends.

headline: YouTube’s New Lead Over Disney Recasts Alphabet As Global Media Power
summary: YouTube has surpassed Disney to become the world's largest media company by revenue, marking a shift toward streaming platforms. This change highlights Alphabet's growing influence in paid media subscriptions and global advertising. The development underscores how YouTube has scaled direct consumer media beyond traditional legacy players. For Alphabet (NasdaqGS: GOOGL), YouTube's new status as the top revenue generator in global media adds a fresh pillar to the story that investors have...

headline: Amazon's Ad-Free Prime Video Plan Will Now Cost $2 More In US— Here's What To Know
summary: Amazon is raising the price of its ad-free Amazon Prime Video tier to $4.99 per month starting April 10, rebranding it as "Prime Video Ultra," as rivals including Netflix, The Walt Disney Company and Paramount Global also push streaming price increases.

headline: Disney Investor Focus As Roeder Takes Helm And Hoppers Hits Big
summary: Walt Disney (NYSE:DIS) has appointed Paul Roeder as its new Chief Communications Officer, succeeding Kristina Schake during a broader leadership transition. At the same time, Pixar's new animated film Hoppers has opened as the top grossing title across the U.S. and Canada, described as Pixar's strongest new character film debut since 2017. For investors watching NYSE:DIS, these moves are landing while the stock trades around $99.29, with a 1.8% return over the past year and a 9.0% return...
